'''thosataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vegetarianist|vegetarianist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vegetarianist|vegetarianist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thosataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thosatithi || thosatiji || thosatishi || thosatiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thosatuthu || thosatuju || thosatushu || thosatuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thosatuthu || thosatuju || thosatushu || thosatuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thosatufthuf || thosatufjuf || thosatufshuf || thosatufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thosatethe || thosateje || thosateshe || thosateke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thosatotho || thosatojo || thosatosho || thosatoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thosatotho || thosatojo || thosatosho || thosatoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thosatofthof || thosatofjof || thosatofshof || thosatofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || thosatïfthïf || thosatïfjïf || thosatïfshïf || thosatïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || thosatïfthïf || thosatïfjïf || thosatïfshïf || thosatïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || thosatïfthïf || thosatïfjïf || thosatïfshïf || thosatïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || thosatïfthïf || thosatïfjïf || thosatïfshïf || thosatïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thosatæthæ || thosatæjæ || thosatæshæ || thosatækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thosatatha || thosataja || thosatasha || thosataka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thosatatha || thosataja || thosatasha || thosataka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thosatafthaf || thosatafjaf || thosatafshaf || thosatafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || thosatasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || thosatshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || thosatroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || thosatmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || thosatyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gothosatnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gothosatnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gothosatnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gothosatnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || thosasatasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || thosasatshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || thosasatroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || thosasatmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || thosasatyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gothosasatnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gothosasatnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gothosasatnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gothosasatnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || thesætasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || thesætshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || thesætroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || thesætmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || thesætyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gothesætnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gothesætnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gothesætnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gothesætnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || thosfatasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || thosfatshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || thosfatroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || thosfatmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || thosfatyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gothosfatnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gothosfatnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gothosfatnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gothosfatnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
